text: A toiled seat evidently in a hotel with a phone on the wall.
Rocky beach of birds with bird flying over head
The young man is making a phone call as he stands in front of a glass-walled building
A bathroom is being renovated and a person is painting the wall.
The giraffe is sticking out its long tongue, perhaps tasting the fence rail.
Lines of doughnuts roll past on a machine rack.
A bride is feeding a man a piece of wedding cake.
A  man wearing a red jacket while holding a smart device.
A man holding a fake gun and pointing it at the camera.
A group of snowboarders jumping off a hill.
